name: @omadia/integration-google-workspace
description: Google Workspace integration for omadia — a service-account (domain-wide-delegation) JWT-bearer client that lets agents read Calendar, Gmail, Drive/Docs/Sheets and the Directory/People surfaces. Publishes the 'googleworkspace.client' + 'googleworkspace.cache' services and contributes read-only tools (gw_calendar_list_events, gw_calendar_freebusy, gw_gmail_search, gw_gmail_get_message, gw_drive_search, gw_drive_get_file, gw_doc_read, gw_sheet_read, gw_directory_users, gw_people_search) plus opt-in writes (gw_calendar_create_event, gw_calendar_update_event, gw_gmail_send, gw_gmail_draft).
